Test Steps: 1. Click 'Register/Sign Up'\n2. Fill in name, email, password, and student ID\n3. Click 'Submit'
Expected Result: Account created, redirects user to Verification screen

Test Steps: 1. Enter valid voter credentials\n2. Click 'Login'
Expected Result: Successful login, redirects to Voter Dashboard

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Admin Login'\n2. Enter admin email and password\n3. Click 'Login'
Expected Result: Successful login, redirects to Admin Dashboard

Test Steps: 1. Enter unregistered email and random password\n2. Click 'Login'
Expected Result: Error dialog/snack-bar displayed showing invalid credentials

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Profile' tab\n2. Scroll and click 'Logout'\n3. Confirm dialog
Expected Result: Session terminated, redirected to Login screen

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Forgot Password'\n2. Enter registered email address\n3. Click 'Reset Password'
Expected Result: Confirmation notification sent to email address

Test Steps: 1. Swipe through onboarding slides\n2. Tap 'Get Started' button
Expected Result: Slides transition smoothly, final button opens Login screen

Test Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Identity Verification'\n2. Select file or input ID photo\n3. Tap 'Upload Documents'
Expected Result: Status updates to 'Pending Verification' on screen

Test Steps: 1. Go to 'User Management' -> 'Pending Verifications'\n2. Locate user and click 'Approve'\n3. Confirm dialog
Expected Result: User status updates to 'Approved' in database and list

Test Steps: 1. Go to 'User Management' -> 'Pending Verifications'\n2. Locate user and click 'Reject'\n3. Enter rejection reason and confirm
Expected Result: User status updates to 'Rejected' with reason

Test Steps:
1. Go to 'Candidate Management'
2. Tap 'Add Candidate' (+)
3. Fill in name, symbol, and bio
4. Click 'Save'
Expected Result: New candidate is created and appears in the list as 'Pending'

Test Steps:
1. Select candidate from management list
2. Tap 'Edit'
3. Modify details (e.g. bio)
4. Tap 'Update'
Expected Result: Candidate details are updated in list and DB

Test Steps: 1. Select candidate from management list\n2. Click 'Delete' (trash icon)\n3. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: Candidate is removed from database and list UI

Test Steps: 1. In Candidate list, locate 'Pending' candidate\n2. Tap '⋮' and choose 'Approve'\n3. Confirm approval
Expected Result: Status updates to 'Approved', candidate becomes active for voting

Test Steps: 1. In Candidate list, locate 'Pending' candidate\n2. Tap '⋮' and choose 'Reject'\n3. Confirm rejection
Expected Result: Status updates to 'Rejected', candidate is hidden from ballot

Test Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Vote Now' tab
Expected Result: An message is shown stating 'Verify your identity to unlock voting'

Prerequisites: Logged in as verified voter, election active
Test Steps:
1. Tap 'Vote Now'
2. Select candidate from ballot list
3. Tap 'Cast Vote'
4. Confirm dialog
Expected Result: Vote is registered successfully, ballot closes

Prerequisites: Voter has already cast a vote
Test Steps: 1. Try to open the 'Vote Now' screen again
Expected Result: Screen displays confirmation message: 'You have already voted'

Test Steps: 1. Tap 'Profile' tab\n2. Tap 'Voting History'
Expected Result: List displays details of the cast vote (timestamp, transaction ID)

Test Steps: 1. Go to 'Election Settings'\n2. Tap 'Start Election'\n3. Confirm
Expected Result: Election status changes to 'Active' on all clients

Test Steps: 1. Go to 'Election Settings'\n2. Tap 'Pause Election'
Expected Result: Status changes to 'Paused', voters cannot access ballot

Test Steps: 1. Go to 'Election Settings'\n2. Tap 'End Election'
Expected Result: Election status changes to 'Ended', voting closes permanently

Test Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Live Results'\n2. Cast a vote on a voter device\n3. Check chart on results screen
Expected Result: Result bar charts animate and increment in real-time

Test Steps: 1. Open 'Live Results' or 'Dashboard'
Expected Result: Winner Banner displays the candidate with the highest votes

Test Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Profile' -> 'Settings'\n2. Toggle 'Dark Mode' switch
Expected Result: The entire app theme switches instantly between Light and Dark
